title: Return of Growth in Gas Engine Vehicle Sales in China Continues
section_path: Return of Growth in Gas Engine Vehicle Sales in China Continues
section_path_text: Return of Growth in Gas Engine Vehicle Sales in China Continues
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, August saw a total of 2.86 million vehicles sold in China (and also 611,000 vehicles exported). Of the 2.86 million vehicles, 1.08 million were gas engine vehicles, which marked a year-on-year rise of 13%. Gas-engine vehicle sales have now grown on a year-on-year basis for three straight months.
